chief_complaint: An 80-year-old female patient presented with a severe SARS-CoV-2 infection.
history: The patient was diagnosed with dermatomyositis in 2014 and initially managed with methotrexate (MTX). In March 2022, the patient experienced a severe SARS-CoV-2 infection with significant pulmonary involvement, necessitating discontinuation of MTX.
exam: Vital signs and physical examination findings are not provided.
labs: Multiple evaluations confirmed sustained negativization of autoantibodies, while persistent capillaroscopic abnormalities suggested ongoing subclinical disease activity.
correct_diagnosis: Immunomodulatory effects of SARS-CoV-2 on autoimmune diseases
differentials: Immunomodulatory effects of SARS-CoV-2 on autoimmune diseases
correct_ranking: Immunomodulatory effects of SARS-CoV-2 on autoimmune diseases
